action.finish_summary: Elicited requirements for the WeChat mini-program: 1) Identity verification process consisting of three methods: real-name authentication, ID document upload with OCR recognition, and facial recognition. 2) Post-verification features: users can query their personal information records (at minimum name, national ID number, and portrait photo) and access an online customer service chat. 3) Visual design: ghost white page background with cadet blue components. Many specific details remain unconfirmed by the user, including: transaction types and scope, exact personal information fields, verification workflow steps, failure handling and retry policies, session persistence, read-only vs editable personal info, security measures beyond verification, navigation structure, privacy policy consent, age requirements, verification result screen content, liveness detection for facial recognition, supported document types, real-time database verification vs text matching, and customer service chat interface details.
